annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Ala. Code § 8-8-10(a) — 7.5% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). For a judgment "based upon a contract action," interest runs "at the same rate of interest as stated in the contract" (the contract rate governs, not… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
